license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.iqzcdx6
title: RNAqueous with TURBO DNA-free and SUPERase-In
author: Daniel J. Richter

steps_raw.instruction: Place elution solution in a dry bath at 70-80ºC undetermined, per pellet
Place pellet in a 50 mL conical tube on ice
Add lysis buffer undetermined
Pipette up and down 5 times to resuspend pellet
While still on ice, add additional lysis buffer undetermined
Pipette up and down 20 times to fully resuspend/lyse pellet
Transfer into two 1.5 mL Eppendorf tubes on ice undetermined, each
Aliquot onto glass slide to check lysis from one Eppendorf tube undetermined Keep the slide inside a petri dish to ensure the noxious smell is contained
Immediately centrifuge both tubes at max speed in a microcentrifuge at 1ºC, 5 min to pellet unlysed bacteria 00:05:00

During centrifugation, add cover slip to glass slide and quickly confirm lysis using a microscope If cells were lysed, transfer supernatant into two new 1.5 mL Eppendorf tubes; otherwise, continue with the same tubes

On ice, pass the lysate in each tube 5 times through a 25 gauge needle fitted to an RNAse-free 1 mL syringe If the cells were not lysed in step 2, pass through the needle an additional time, and re-check lysis before continuing.
Add 64% Ethanol (at room temperature (RT)) per tube undetermined
Mix thoroughly by inverting the tubes several times
Transfer lysate/ethanol mixture from one of the Eppendorf tubes to a single filter cartridge in a collection tube undetermined
Centrifuge at 15,000 xg, RT, 30 sec or until the mixture is drawn through the filter 00:00:30
Discard the flow through
Repeat steps 14-16 three additional times until all of the lysate/ethanol mixture in both tubes has been drawn through the filter cartridge
Add wash solution #1 undetermined
Centrifuge at 15,000 xg, RT, 30 sec 00:00:30
Discard the flow through
Add wash solution #2/3 undetermined
Centrifuge at 15,000 x g, RT, 30 sec 00:00:30
Discard the flow through
Repeat wash steps 21-23
Centrifuge an additional 30 sec at 15,000 x g 00:00:30 This step removes residual wash solution #2/3
Place filter cartridge in a new collection tube
Pipette pre-heated elution solution onto the filter undetermined
Centrifuge at 15,000 xg, 30 sec 00:00:30
Pipette an additional pre-heated elution solution onto the filter undetermined
Centrifuge at 15,000 x g, 30 sec Final volume of eluate should be ~45 uL
Spec on NanoDrop and make a dilution at 1:5 (2 µl :8 µl) in a separate tube for PCR/Bioanalyzer undetermined, aliquot

Take an aliquot of 1:5 dilution from previous step and dilute to 1 ng/µL in a seperate tube (for Bioanalyzer) If concentration is >240 ng/uL (10 ug / 41.5 uL), dilute an aliquot to 240 ng/uL in 41.5 uL and save remainder at -80 C
Add SUPERase-In (at 20 U/µL, final concentration at 1 U/µL) undetermined
Add 10X TURBO DNAse Buffer undetermined
Incubate at 37ºC for 30 min 00:30:00
Vortex DNAse Inactivation Reagent to resuspend
Add DNAse Inactivation Reagent undetermined
Incubate 5 min at 22-26ºC, flicking to mix 2-3 times during incubation. 00:05:00
Centrifuge at max speed for 1.5 min at RT 00:01:30
Transfer RNA to a fresh tube undetermined To avoid transferring beads, pipette out at an angle and rotate tube such that beads are on the bottom.
Repeat centrifugation/transfer (steps 39-40) 2-3 times until no beads are transferred
Spec on NanoDrop and dilute 1 µL aliquot of RNA to 1 ng/µL in a seperate tube (for Bioanalyzer)
